name: Peanut Butter & Jelly Streusel Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 13-inch x 9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat shortening and brown sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add peanut butter, milk, and vanilla; mix until combined.
5. Stir in the egg until just mixed.
6. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
7. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the shortening mixture, mixing only until combined.
8. Press 2/3 of the dough evenly into the prepared pan.
9. Spread jam over the dough, leaving about 1-inch (2.5 cm) from the edges.
10. Combine the remaining dough with oats and drop spoonfuls onto the jam layer.
11. Lightly press to even out the top layer.
12. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the edges and streusel topping are lightly browned.
13. Allow to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
14. Cut into bars before serving.
